📊 System Resources

🔗 API Endpoints

/api/healthGET
/api/systemGET
/api/interfacesGET
/api/pppoe/statusGET
/api/pppoe/createPOST
/api/nat/statusGET
/api/nat/enablePOST
/api/dhcp/statusGET
/api/dhcp/enablePOST
/api/dns/statusGET
/api/dns/enablePOST
pppoe: function() { return t('pppoe'); }, interfaces: function() { return t('interfaces'); }, routes: function() { return t('routes'); }, dhcp: function() { return t('dhcp'); }, dns: function() { return t('dns'); }, nat: function() { return t('nat'); }, system: function() { return t('system_info'); } }; // ============================================================ // Navigation // ============================================================ function nav(p) { document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(e => e.classList.remove('active')); document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(e => e.classList.remove('active')); document.getElementById('p-' + p).classList.add('active'); document.querySelector('[data-page="' + p + '"]').classList.add('active'); const pageTitle = typeof PAGES[p] === 'function' ? PAGES[p]() : (PAGES[p] || p); document.getElementById('h-title').textContent = pageTitle; currentPage = p; load(p); } // ============================================================ // Toast // ============================================================ function toast(message, type, subtitle) { type = type || 'success'; subtitle = subtitle || ''; const container = document.getElementById('toasts'); const d = document.createElement('div'); d.className = 'toast toast-' + (type === 'success' ? 'ok' : type === 'error' ? 'err' : 'info'); const icons = { success: '✓', error: '✕', info: 'ℹ' }; d.innerHTML = '
' + (icons[type]||'✓') + '
' + '
' + message + '
' + (subtitle ? '
' + subtitle + '
' : '') + '
'; container.appendChild(d); setTimeout(() => { d.style.animation = 'slideOut 0.3s var(--ease) forwards'; setTimeout(() => d.remove(), 300); }, 4000); } // ============================================================ // API // ============================================================ async function api(url, opts) { opts = opts || {}; try { updateConnectionStatus(true); const response = await fetch(url, opts); const data = await response.json(); return data.error ? { error: data.error } : data; } catch (e) { updateConnectionStatus(false); return { error: e.message }; } } function updateConnectionStatus(connected) { const dot = document.getElementById('conn-dot'); const text = document.getElementById('conn-text'); if (connected) { dot.className = 'conn-dot'; text.textContent = t('connected'); apiHealthy = true; } else { dot.className = 'conn-dot offline'; text.textContent = t('disconnected'); apiHealthy = false; } } function toggleAutoRefresh() { const enabled = document.getElementById('auto-refresh').checked; if (enabled) { startAutoRefresh(); toast(t('auto_refresh_enabled'), 'info', t('auto_refresh_sub')); } else { stopAutoRefresh(); toast(t('auto_refresh_disabled'), 'info'); } } function startAutoRefresh() { stopAutoRefresh(); autoRefreshTimer = setInterval(() => load(currentPage), 2000); } function stopAutoRefresh() { if (autoRefreshTimer) { clearInterval(autoRefreshTimer); autoRefreshTimer = null; } } function showLoading(elementId, message) { const el = document.getElementById(elementId); if (el) el.innerHTML = '
' + (message || t('loading')) + '
'; } function showError(elementId, error, retryFn) { const el = document.getElementById(elementId); if (el) { let html = '
⚠️

' + escapeHtml(error) + '

'; if (retryFn) html += ''; el.innerHTML = html + '
'; } } function escapeHtml(text) { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.textContent = text; return div.innerHTML; } async function refreshAll() { toast(t('refreshing_data'), 'info'); await Promise.all([loadDashboard(), loadPppoe(), loadIfaces(), loadRoutes()]); toast(t('all_data_refreshed'), 'success'); } function load(page) { switch (page) { case 'dashboard': loadDashboard(); break; case 'pppoe': loadPppoe(); break; case 'interfaces': loadIfaces(); break; case 'routes': loadRoutes(); break; case 'nat': loadNat(); break; case 'dhcp': loadDhcp(); break; case 'dns': loadDns(); break; case 'system': loadSystem(); break; } } function formatBytes(bytes) { if (!bytes) return '0 B'; if (bytes < 1024) return bytes + ' B'; if (bytes < 1048576) return (bytes / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB'; if (bytes < 1073741824) return (bytes / 1048576).toFixed(1) + ' MB'; return (bytes / 1073741824).toFixed(1) + ' GB'; } function formatThroughput(bps) { if (!bps || bps === 0) return '0 B/s'; if (bps < 1024) return bps.toFixed(0) + ' B/s'; if (bps < 1048576) return (bps / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB/s'; return (bps / 1048576).toFixed(1) + ' MB/s'; } function formatNumber(n) { if (!n) return '0'; if (n >= 1000000) return (n / 1000000).toFixed(1) + 'M'; if (n >= 1000) return (n / 1000).toFixed(1) + 'K'; return '' + n; } function formatUptime(seconds) { if (!seconds || seconds === 0) return '00:00:00'; var h = Math.floor(seconds / 3600), m = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60), s = seconds % 60; return (h < 10 ? '0' : '') + h + ':' + (m < 10 ? '0' : '') + m + ':' + (s < 10 ? '0' : '') + s; } // ============================================================ // Table Sort & Filter // ============================================================ function sortTable(tableId, colIndex, type) { const tbody = document.getElementById(tableId); if (!tbody) return; const ths = tbody.closest('table').querySelectorAll('th'); const key = tableId + '-' + colIndex; const asc = sortState[key] === 'asc'; sortState[key] = asc ? 'desc' : 'asc'; ths.forEach(th => { th.classList.remove('sort-asc', 'sort-desc'); }); ths[colIndex].classList.add(asc ? 'sort-desc' : 'sort-asc'); const rows = Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll('tr')); rows.sort((a, b) => { let va = (a.cells[colIndex] ? a.cells[colIndex].textContent.trim() : ''); let vb = (b.cells[colIndex] ? b.cells[colIndex].textContent.trim() : ''); if (type === 'num') { va = parseFloat(va) || 0; vb = parseFloat(vb) || 0; } if (va < vb) return asc ? -1 : 1; if (va > vb) return asc ? 1 : -1; return 0; }); rows.forEach(r => tbody.appendChild(r)); } function filterIfaceTable() { const q = document.getElementById('iface-search').value.toLowerCase(); const rows = document.querySelectorAll('#if-tb tr'); rows.forEach(r => { r.style.display = q && r.textContent.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) === -1 ? 'none' : ''; }); } function filterRouteTable() { const q = document.getElementById('route-search').value.toLowerCase(); const rows = document.querySelectorAll('#rt-tb tr'); rows.forEach(r => { r.style.display = q && r.textContent.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) === -1 ? 'none' : ''; }); } // ============================================================ // Alerts // ============================================================ function addAlert(type, message, category) { const now = new Date(); const locale = currentLang === 'zh' ? 'zh-CN' : 'en-US'; const timeStr = now.toLocaleTimeString(locale); const recent = alerts.find(a => a.category === category && (now - a.time) < 10000); if (recent) return; alerts.unshift({ id: ++lastAlertId, type, message, category, time: now, timeStr }); if (alerts.length > 20) alerts.pop(); } function clearAlert(category) { alerts = alerts.filter(a => a.category !== category); } function renderAlerts() { const body = document.getElementById('alerts-body'); const countEl = document.getElementById('alert-count'); if (!body || !countEl) return; const count = alerts.length; countEl.textContent = count; countEl.className = 'alerts-count ' + (count > 0 ? 'has-alerts' : 'zero'); if (count === 0) { body.innerHTML = '
✓ ' + t('no_active_alerts') + '
'; return; } body.innerHTML = alerts.map(a => { const iconEmoji = a.type === 'err' ? '⚠️' : a.type === 'warn' ? '⚠️' : 'ℹ️'; return '
' + iconEmoji + '
' + '
' + escapeHtml(a.message) + '
' + '
' + a.timeStr + '
' + '' + t('alert_' + a.type) + '
'; }).join(''); } // ============================================================ // Health Bar // ============================================================ function updateHealthBar(cpuPct, memPct, pppoeOk, servicesActive, totalServices) { const dotEl = document.getElementById('health-dot-lg'); const labelEl = document.getElementById('health-label'); const detailEl = document.getElementById('health-detail'); const chipsEl = document.getElementById('health-chips'); let overallStatus = 'ok', details = []; if (cpuPct >= 90) { overallStatus = 'err'; details.push(t('critical_cpu')); } else if (cpuPct >= 75) { overallStatus = 'warn'; details.push(t('high_cpu')); } if (memPct >= 90) { overallStatus = 'err'; details.push(t('critical_memory')); } else if (memPct >= 80) { overallStatus = 'warn'; details.push(t('high_memory')); } if (!pppoeOk) { if (overallStatus === 'ok') overallStatus = 'warn'; details.push(t('pppoe_offline')); } dotEl.className = 'health-dot-lg ' + overallStatus; if (overallStatus === 'ok') { labelEl.textContent = t('system_healthy'); labelEl.style.color = 'var(--green)'; detailEl.textContent = t('all_services_operating', {n: totalServices}); } else if (overallStatus === 'warn') { labelEl.textContent = t('system_warning'); labelEl.style.color = 'var(--yellow)'; detailEl.textContent = details.join(', '); } else { labelEl.textContent = t('system_critical'); labelEl.style.color = 'var(--red)'; detailEl.textContent = details.join(', '); } let chipsHtml = ''; chipsHtml += '
PPPoE ' + (pppoeOk ? t('pppoe_on') : t('pppoe_off')) + '
'; chipsHtml += '
' + t('services_count') + ' ' + servicesActive + '/' + totalServices + '
'; chipsHtml += '
' + t('cpu_label') + ' ' + cpuPct + '%
'; chipsHtml += '
' + t('mem_label') + ' ' + memPct + '%
'; chipsEl.innerHTML = chipsHtml; } // ============================================================ // Dashboard // ============================================================ async function loadDashboard() { const [health, pppoe, nat, dhcp, dns, system, ifaces] = await Promise.all([ api('/api/health'), api('/api/pppoe/status'), api('/api/nat/status'), api('/api/dhcp/status'), api('/api/dns/status'), api('/api/system'), api('/api/interfaces') ]); const healthChip = document.getElementById('health-chip'); const healthText = document.getElementById('health-text'); if (health.error) { healthChip.className = 'hdr-chip error'; healthText.textContent = t('error'); } else { healthChip.className = 'hdr-chip'; healthText.textContent = t('healthy'); } if (health.version) document.getElementById('h-tag').textContent = health.version; const sys = system.system || {}, cpu = sys.cpu || {}, mem = sys.memory || {}, disk = sys.disk || {}; const cpuPct = cpu.percent || 0, memPct = mem.percent || 0; const hasPppoe = pppoe.pppoe_clients && pppoe.pppoe_clients.length > 0; const pppoeClient = hasPppoe ? pppoe.pppoe_clients[0] : null; document.getElementById('nb-pppoe').textContent = hasPppoe ? t('online') : t('offline'); const ifaceCount = ifaces.interfaces ? ifaces.interfaces.length : 0; document.getElementById('nb-ifaces').textContent = ifaceCount; let activeServices = 0; if (nat.interfaces && nat.interfaces.length > 0) activeServices++; if (dhcp.servers && dhcp.servers.length > 0 && dhcp.servers[0] !== '') activeServices++; if (dns.status === 'active') activeServices++; document.getElementById('ms-uptime').textContent = sys.uptime || '--:--:--'; if (hasPppoe) { const stateMap = { 0: t('discovering'), 1: t('requesting'), 2: t('session') }; document.getElementById('ms-pppoe-state').textContent = stateMap[pppoeClient.client_state] || t('unknown'); document.getElementById('ms-pppoe-sub').textContent = pppoeClient.ipv4_local || t('no_ip'); } else { document.getElementById('ms-pppoe-state').textContent = t('idle'); document.getElementById('ms-pppoe-sub').textContent = t('not_configured'); } const dhcpEnabled = dhcp.servers && dhcp.servers.length > 0 && dhcp.servers[0] !== ''; document.getElementById('ms-dhcp-count').textContent = dhcpEnabled ? t('enabled') : t('disabled'); document.getElementById('ms-dhcp-sub').textContent = dhcpEnabled ? t('active_server') : t('disabled'); const dnsActive = dns.status === 'active'; document.getElementById('ms-dns-hits').textContent = dnsActive ? t('enabled') : t('disabled'); document.getElementById('ms-dns-sub').textContent = dnsActive ? t('cache_entries', {n: dns.cache_size || 0}) : t('disabled'); const natSessions = (nat.sessions || []).length; document.getElementById('ms-nat-sessions').textContent = natSessions; document.getElementById('ms-nat-sub').textContent = (nat.interfaces || []).length > 0 ? t('active') : t('disabled'); document.getElementById('ms-ifaces').textContent = ifaceCount; document.getElementById('ms-ifaces-sub').textContent = t('total'); updateHealthBar(cpuPct, memPct, hasPppoe, activeServices, 3); cpuHistory.push(cpuPct); if (cpuHistory.length > MAX_HISTORY) cpuHistory.shift(); renderBarChart('cpu-chart-full', cpuHistory, cpuPct + '%', 'spark-accent', 100); document.getElementById('mc-cpu-val').innerHTML = cpuPct + '% ' + t('current') + ''; memHistory.push(memPct); if (memHistory.length > MAX_HISTORY) memHistory.shift(); renderBarChart('mem-chart-full', memHistory, memPct + '%', 'spark-purple', 100); document.getElementById('mc-mem-val').innerHTML = memPct + '% ' + t('of_total', {n: formatBytes(mem.total)}) + ''; natHistory.push(natSessions); if (natHistory.length > MAX_HISTORY) natHistory.shift(); const natMax = Math.max(10, Math.max.apply(null, natHistory)); renderBarChart('nat-chart-full', natHistory, natSessions + '', 'spark-orange', natMax); document.getElementById('mc-nat-val').innerHTML = natSessions + ' ' + t('sessions') + ''; const pppoeUptime = pppoeClient ? (pppoeClient.session_uptime_seconds || 0) : 0; pppoeHistory.push(pppoeUptime); if (pppoeHistory.length > MAX_HISTORY) pppoeHistory.shift(); const pppoeMax = Math.max(60, Math.max.apply(null, pppoeHistory)); renderBarChart('pppoe-chart-full', pppoeHistory, pppoeUptime + 's', 'spark-cyan', pppoeMax); document.getElementById('mc-pppoe-val').innerHTML = pppoeUptime + 's'; updateDiskDonut(disk); renderThroughputChart(ifaces.interfaces || []); renderInterfaceStats(ifaces.interfaces || []); // Alerts if (cpuPct >= 90) addAlert('err', t('critical_cpu') + ' ' + cpuPct + '%', 'cpu-high'); else if (cpuPct >= 75) addAlert('warn', t('high_cpu') + ' ' + cpuPct + '%', 'cpu-high'); else clearAlert('cpu-high'); if (memPct >= 90) addAlert('err', t('critical_memory') + ' ' + memPct + '%', 'mem-high'); else if (memPct >= 80) addAlert('warn', t('high_memory') + ' ' + memPct + '%', 'mem-high'); else clearAlert('mem-high'); if (ifaces.interfaces) ifaces.interfaces.forEach(iface => { if (iface.state === 'down' && iface.name !== 'local0') addAlert('err', t('interface') + ' ' + iface.name + ' ' + t('down_state'), 'iface-down-' + iface.name); else clearAlert('iface-down-' + iface.name); }); if (!hasPppoe) { if (pppoeHistory.length > 1 && pppoeHistory[pppoeHistory.length - 2] > 0) addAlert('err', t('pppoe_session') + ' ' + t('disconnected'), 'pppoe-down'); } else clearAlert('pppoe-down'); if (!dnsActive) addAlert('info', t('dns_forwarding') + ' ' + t('disabled'), 'dns-off'); else clearAlert('dns-off'); if (!dhcpEnabled) addAlert('info', t('dhcp_service') + ' ' + t('disabled'), 'dhcp-off'); else clearAlert('dhcp-off'); renderAlerts(); const vppText = document.getElementById('vpp-status-text'); if (health.vpp_running) { vppText.textContent = t('running'); vppText.style.color = 'var(--green)'; } else { vppText.textContent = t('stopped'); vppText.style.color = 'var(--text-3)'; } loadSystemInfo(health, pppoe, nat, dhcp, dns); } function loadSystemInfo(health, pppoe, nat, dhcp, dns) { const hasPppoe = pppoe.pppoe_clients && pppoe.pppoe_clients.length > 0; const el = document.getElementById('sys-info'); el.innerHTML = '' + '
' + t('version') + '' + (health.version || '--') + '
' + '
' + t('vpp_data_plane') + '' + (health.vpp_running ? t('running') : t('stopped')) + '
' + '
PPPoE' + (hasPppoe ? t('connected') : t('not_configured')) + '
' + '
NAT' + (nat.interfaces && nat.interfaces.length > 0 ? t('enabled') : t('disabled')) + '
' + '
DHCP' + (dhcp.servers && dhcp.servers.length > 0 && dhcp.servers[0] !== '' ? t('enabled') : t('disabled')) + '
' + '
DNS' + (dns.status === 'active' ? t('enabled') : t('disabled')) + '
'; } // ============================================================ // Charts // ============================================================ function renderBarChart(elementId, data, currentLabel, colorClass, maxVal) { const el = document.getElementById(elementId); if (!el) return; let html = ''; const len = data.length; for (let i = 0; i < MAX_HISTORY; i++) { const val = i < len ? data[i] : 0; const pct = maxVal > 0 ? Math.max(2, (val / maxVal) * 100) : 2; const age = len - 1 - i; const opacity = i >= len ? 0.12 : (0.3 + (1 - age / MAX_HISTORY) * 0.7); html += '
'; } el.innerHTML = html; } function renderThroughputChart(interfaces) { const el = document.getElementById('tp-chart'); if (!el) return; let totalRx = 0, totalTx = 0; interfaces.forEach(iface => { totalRx += (iface.rx_bytes || 0); totalTx += (iface.tx_bytes || 0); }); let rxRate = 0, txRate = 0; if (prevIfaceStats.totalRx !== undefined) { rxRate = Math.max(0, totalRx - prevIfaceStats.totalRx); txRate = Math.max(0, totalTx - prevIfaceStats.totalTx); } prevIfaceStats.totalRx = totalRx; prevIfaceStats.totalTx = totalTx; rxHistory.push(rxRate); txHistory.push(txRate); if (rxHistory.length > MAX_HISTORY) rxHistory.shift(); if (txHistory.length > MAX_HISTORY) txHistory.shift(); const maxTP = Math.max(1024, Math.max.apply(null, rxHistory.concat(txHistory))); let html = ''; for (let i = 0; i < MAX_HISTORY; i++) { const rx = i < rxHistory.length ? rxHistory[i] : 0; const tx = i < txHistory.length ? txHistory[i] : 0; const rxAge = rxHistory.length - 1 - i, txAge = txHistory.length - 1 - i; const rxH = maxTP > 0 ? Math.max(1, (rx / maxTP) * 100) : 1; const txH = maxTP > 0 ? Math.max(1, (tx / maxTP) * 100) : 1; const rxOp = i >= rxHistory.length ? 0.12 : (0.3 + (1 - rxAge / MAX_HISTORY) * 0.7); const txOp = i >= txHistory.length ? 0.12 : (0.3 + (1 - txAge / MAX_HISTORY) * 0.7); html += '
' + '
'; } el.innerHTML = html; document.getElementById('mc-tp-val').innerHTML = formatThroughput(rxRate) + ' / ' + formatThroughput(txRate) + ' ' + t('rx_tx_label') + ''; } function renderInterfaceStats(interfaces) { const grid = document.getElementById('iface-stats-grid'); if (!grid) return; const showIfaces = interfaces.filter(i => i.name !== 'local0'); if (showIfaces.length === 0) { grid.innerHTML = ''; return; } let html = ''; showIfaces.forEach(iface => { const name = iface.name, state = iface.state || 'down'; const stateClass = state === 'up' ? 'b-green' : 'b-yellow'; const stateText = state === 'up' ? t('up') : t('down_state'); if (!ifaceHistory[name]) ifaceHistory[name] = { rx: [], tx: [], rxPkts: [], txPkts: [], errors: [], drops: [] }; const ih = ifaceHistory[name]; const rxBytes = iface.rx_bytes || 0, txBytes = iface.tx_bytes || 0; const rxPkts = iface.rx_packets || iface.rx_pkts || 0, txPkts = iface.tx_packets || iface.tx_pkts || 0; const rxErrors = iface.rx_errors || 0, txErrors = iface.tx_errors || 0; const rxDrops = iface.rx_drops || 0, txDrops = iface.tx_drops || 0; ih.rx.push(rxBytes); ih.tx.push(txBytes); ih.rxPkts.push(rxPkts); ih.txPkts.push(txPkts); ih.errors.push(rxErrors + txErrors); ih.drops.push(rxDrops + txDrops); if (ih.rx.length > MAX_HISTORY) { ih.rx.shift(); ih.tx.shift(); } if (ih.rxPkts.length > MAX_HISTORY) { ih.rxPkts.shift(); ih.txPkts.shift(); } if (ih.errors.length > MAX_HISTORY) ih.errors.shift(); if (ih.drops.length > MAX_HISTORY) ih.drops.shift(); const rxSparks = ih.rx.slice(-20), txSparks = ih.tx.slice(-20); const errSparks = ih.errors.slice(-20), dropSparks = ih.drops.slice(-20); const typeMap = { wan0: t('wan'), lan0: t('lan'), lan1: t('lan'), 'pppoe-wan0': t('pppoe_type') }; const badgeMap = { wan0: 'b-accent', lan0: 'b-green', lan1: 'b-green', 'pppoe-wan0': 'b-cyan' }; html += '
' + '
' + (typeMap[name]||'') + '' + name + '
' + ' ' + stateText + '
' + '
' + '
⬇ ' + t('rx_bytes_label') + '
' + renderMiniSparkline(rxSparks, 'cyan') + '' + formatBytes(rxBytes) + '
' + '
⬆ ' + t('tx_bytes_label') + '
' + renderMiniSparkline(txSparks, 'purple') + '' + formatBytes(txBytes) + '
' + '
' + t('rx_packets') + '' + formatNumber(rxPkts) + '
' + '
' + t('tx_packets') + '' + formatNumber(txPkts) + '
' + '
' + t('errors') + '
' + renderMiniSparkline(errSparks, 'red') + '' + (rxErrors+txErrors) + '
' + '
' + t('drops') + '
' + renderMiniSparkline(dropSparks, 'orange') + '' + (rxDrops+txDrops) + '
' + '
'; }); grid.innerHTML = html; } function renderMiniSparkline(data, colorClass) { if (!data || data.length === 0) return '
'; const max = Math.max(1, Math.max.apply(null, data)); let html = '
'; data.slice(-12).forEach(val => { html += '
'; }); return html + '
'; } function updateDiskDonut(disk) { const percent = disk.percent || 0, used = disk.used || 0, total = disk.total || 1, free = total - used; document.getElementById('mc-disk-val').innerHTML = percent + '% ' + t('of_total', {n: formatBytes(total)}) + ''; const donut = document.getElementById('disk-donut'); const legend = document.getElementById('disk-legend'); if (!donut || !legend) return; donut.style.background = 'conic-gradient(var(--purple) 0% ' + percent + '%, var(--bg-4) ' + percent + '% 100%)'; donut.innerHTML = '
' + percent + '%
' + t('used') + '
'; legend.innerHTML = '
' + t('used') + '' + formatBytes(used) + '
' + '
' + t('free') + '' + formatBytes(free) + '
' + '
' + t('total_disk') + '' + formatBytes(total) + '
'; } // ============================================================ // PPPoE // ============================================================ function addPppoeLog(type, message) { const now = new Date(); const locale = currentLang === 'zh' ? 'zh-CN' : 'en-US'; pppoeLogs.unshift({ type, message, time: now.toLocaleTimeString(locale) }); if (pppoeLogs.length > MAX_PPPOE_LOGS) pppoeLogs.pop(); renderPppoeLogs(); } function renderPppoeLogs() { const el = document.getElementById('pppoe-logs'); if (!el) return; if (pppoeLogs.length === 0) { el.innerHTML = '
[--:--:--] Waiting for PPPoE events...
'; return; } el.innerHTML = pppoeLogs.map(function(log) { return '
[' + log.time + '] ' + escapeHtml(log.message) + '
'; }).join(''); } function clearPppoeLogs() { pppoeLogs = []; renderPppoeLogs(); toast(t('logs_cleared'), 'info'); } function switchPppoeTab(tab) { document.querySelectorAll('.pppoe-tab').forEach(function(el) { el.classList.remove('active'); }); document.querySelectorAll('.pppoe-tab-panel').forEach(function(el) { el.classList.remove('active'); }); document.getElementById('ptab-' + tab).classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('ptab-panel-' + tab).classList.add('active'); if (tab === 'interfaces') loadIfaceControls(); } function quickSetup(preset) { document.querySelectorAll('.quick-card').forEach(function(el) { el.classList.remove('active'); }); document.getElementById('qs-' + preset).classList.add('active'); var presets = { telecom: { username: '010xxxx@163gd', password: '', interface: 'enp1s0', mtu: 1492, mru: 1492, use_peer_dns: true, add_default_route4: true, add_default_route6: true }, unicom: { username: '010xxxx@unicom', password: '', interface: 'enp1s0', mtu: 1492, mru: 1492, use_peer_dns: true, add_default_route4: true, add_default_route6: true }, mobile: { username: '010xxxx@cmcc', password: '', interface: 'enp1s0', mtu: 1492, mru: 1492, use_peer_dns: true, add_default_route4: true, add_default_route6: true } }; var p = presets[preset]; if (!p) return; document.getElementById('pu').value = p.username; document.getElementById('pp').value = p.password; document.getElementById('pi').value = p.interface; document.getElementById('pmtu').value = p.mtu; document.getElementById('pmru').value = p.mru; document.getElementById('pdns').checked = p.use_peer_dns; document.getElementById('pr4').checked = p.add_default_route4; document.getElementById('pr6').checked = p.add_default_route6; addPppoeLog('info', 'Quick Setup: ' + preset.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + preset.slice(1) + ' preset applied'); toast('Quick Setup applied for ' + preset.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + preset.slice(1), 'info'); } function onInterfaceSelectChange() {} async function loadIfaceControls() { var grid = document.getElementById('iface-control-grid'); if (!grid) return; grid.innerHTML = '
Loading interfaces...
'; var d = await api('/api/interfaces'); if (d.error) { grid.innerHTML = '
⚠️

' + escapeHtml(d.error) + '

'; return; } var ifaces = (d.interfaces || []).filter(function(i) { return i.name !== 'local0'; }); if (ifaces.length === 0) { grid.innerHTML = '
🌐

No VF interfaces found

'; return; } grid.innerHTML = ifaces.map(function(iface) { var state = iface.state || 'down'; var stateClass = state === 'up' ? 'b-green' : 'b-yellow'; var stateText = state === 'up' ? t('up') : t('down_state'); var toggleBtn = state === 'up' ? '' : ''; var isSelected = document.getElementById('pi') && document.getElementById('pi').value === iface.name; return '
' + '
' + (isSelected ? '🔌 ' : '🌐 ') + iface.name + (isSelected ? ' (selected)' : '') + '
' + ' ' + stateText + '
' + '
MTU: ' + (iface.mtu || '--') + '
' + toggleBtn + '
'; }).join(''); } async function pppoeIfaceUp(name) { toast(t('bringing_up', {name: name}), 'info'); addPppoeLog('info', 'Bringing up interface ' + name + '...'); var d = await api('/api/interfaces/' + name + '/up', { method: 'POST' }); if (d.error) { toast(t('iface_up_failed', {name: name, msg: d.error}), 'error'); addPppoeLog('error', 'Failed to bring up ' + name + ': ' + d.error); } else { toast(t('iface_up_success', {name: name}), 'success'); addPppoeLog('success', 'Interface ' + name + ' is now UP'); loadIfaceControls(); } } async function pppoeIfaceDown(name) { toast(t('bringing_down', {name: name}), 'info'); addPppoeLog('info', 'Bringing down interface ' + name + '...'); var d = await api('/api/interfaces/' + name + '/down', { method: 'POST' }); if (d.error) { toast(t('iface_down_failed', {name: name, msg: d.error}), 'error'); addPppoeLog('error', 'Failed to bring down ' + name + ': ' + d.error); } else { toast(t('iface_down_success', {name: name}), 'success'); addPppoeLog('success', 'Interface ' + name + ' is now DOWN'); loadIfaceControls(); } } async function loadPppoe() { showLoading('pppoe-el', t('loading')); var d = await api('/api/pppoe/status'); var el = document.getElementById('pppoe-el'); if (d.error) { showError('pppoe-el', d.error, 'loadPppoe()'); return; } var hasPppoe = d.pppoe_clients && d.pppoe_clients.length > 0; var disconnectBtn = document.getElementById('pppoe-disconnect-btn'); if (hasPppoe) { var c = d.pppoe_clients[0]; var stateMap = { 0: t('discovering'), 1: t('requesting'), 2: t('session') }; var heroClass = c.client_state === 2 ? 'connected' : 'connecting'; var heroIcon = c.client_state === 2 ? '✅' : '⏳'; el.innerHTML = '' + '
' + heroIcon + '
' + '
' + (stateMap[c.client_state] || t('unknown')) + '
' + (c.ipv4_local && c.ipv4_local !== '0.0.0.0' ? '
' + c.ipv4_local + '
' : '
--
') + '
' + (c.ipv4_peer && c.ipv4_peer !== '0.0.0.0' ? t('peer_ipv4') + ': ' + c.ipv4_peer : '') + '
' + '
' + t('pppoe_username') + '' + escapeHtml(c.auth_user) + '
' + '
' + t('pppoe_interface') + 'pppoe-wan0 (idx ' + c.pppox_sw_if_index + ')
' + '
' + t('pppoe_mtu_mru') + '' + c.mtu + ' / ' + c.mru + '
' + '
' + t('local_ipv4') + '' + c.ipv4_local + '
' + '
' + t('peer_ipv4') + '' + c.ipv4_peer + '
' + '
' + t('pppoe_dns') + '' + (c.use_peer_dns ? t('pppoe_isp_dns') : t('pppoe_custom_dns')) + '
' + '
' + t('default_route') + '' + (c.add_default_route4 ? 'IPv4' : '') + (c.add_default_route6 ? ' IPv6' : '') + '
' + '
' + t('reconnects') + '' + c.total_reconnects + '
' + '
' + t('session_uptime') + '' + formatUptime(c.session_uptime_seconds) + '
' + '
'; if (disconnectBtn) disconnectBtn.style.display = ''; prefillPppoeForm(c); if (!pppoeConnectedState && c.client_state === 2) addPppoeLog('success', 'PPPoE session established, IP: ' + c.ipv4_local); else if (!pppoeConnectedState && c.client_state === 0) addPppoeLog('info', 'PPPoE discovering on ' + (c.interface || 'unknown')); else if (!pppoeConnectedState && c.client_state === 1) addPppoeLog('info', 'PPPoE requesting session...'); pppoeConnectedState = true; } else { el.innerHTML = '
🔌
' + '
' + t('disconnected') + '
' + '
' + t('no_pppoe_configured') + '
' + '
' + t('fill_form_hint') + '
'; if (disconnectBtn) disconnectBtn.style.display = 'none'; if (pppoeConnectedState) addPppoeLog('warn', 'PPPoE session ended'); pppoeConnectedState = false; } } function prefillPppoeForm(c) { if (!c) return; var pu = document.getElementById('pu'), pi = document.getElementById('pi'); var pmtu = document.getElementById('pmtu'), pmru = document.getElementById('pmru'); var pdns = document.getElementById('pdns'), pr4 = document.getElementById('pr4'), pr6 = document.getElementById('pr6'); if (pu && !pu.value && c.auth_user) pu.value = c.auth_user; if (pi && c.interface) pi.value = c.interface; if (pmtu && c.mtu) pmtu.value = c.mtu; if (pmru && c.mru) pmru.value = c.mru; if (pdns) pdns.checked = c.use_peer_dns; if (pr4) pr4.checked = c.add_default_route4; if (pr6) pr6.checked = c.add_default_route6; } async function savePppoe(e) { e.preventDefault(); var btn = document.getElementById('pppoe-submit-btn'); var origText = btn.innerHTML; btn.innerHTML = '
' + t('connecting'); btn.disabled = true; var config = { username: document.getElementById('pu').value, password: document.getElementById('pp').value, interface: document.getElementById('pi').value, mtu: parseInt(document.getElementById('pmtu').value), mru: parseInt(document.getElementById('pmru').value), use_peer_dns: document.getElementById('pdns').checked, add_default_route4: document.getElementById('pr4').checked, add_default_route6: document.getElementById('pr6').checked }; addPppoeLog('info', 'Connecting as ' + config.username + ' on ' + config.interface + '...'); try { var res = await fetch('/api/pppoe/create', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(config) }); var data = await res.json(); if (data.error) { toast(t('connection_failed', {msg: data.error}), 'error'); addPppoeLog('error', 'Connection failed: ' + data.error); } else { toast(t('pppoe_created'), 'success', t('connection_establishing')); addPppoeLog('success', 'PPPoE client created, establishing connection...'); loadPppoe(); } } catch (err) { toast(t('request_failed', {msg: err.message}), 'error'); addPppoeLog('error', 'Request failed: ' + err.message); } finally { btn.innerHTML = origText; btn.disabled = false; } } async function pppoeRestart() { toast(t('reconnecting'), 'info'); addPppoeLog('info', 'Reconnecting...'); var config = { username: document.getElementById('pu').value, password: document.getElementById('pp').value, interface: document.getElementById('pi').value || 'enp1s0', mtu: parseInt(document.getElementById('pmtu').value) || 1492, mru: parseInt(document.getElementById('pmru').value) || 1492, use_peer_dns: document.getElementById('pdns').checked, add_default_route4: document.getElementById('pr4').checked, add_default_route6: document.getElementById('pr6').checked }; try { var res = await fetch('/api/pppoe/create', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(config) }); var data = await res.json(); if (data.error) { toast(t('reconnect_failed', {msg: data.error}), 'error'); addPppoeLog('error', 'Reconnect failed: ' + data.error); } else { toast(t('pppoe_reconnecting'), 'success'); addPppoeLog('info', 'Reconnect request sent'); setTimeout(loadPppoe, 2000); } } catch (err) { toast(t('request_failed', {msg: err.message}), 'error'); addPppoeLog('error', 'Request failed: ' + err.message); } } async function pppoeStop() { toast('Disconnecting...', 'info'); addPppoeLog('info', 'Disconnecting PPPoE session...'); try { var res = await fetch('/api/interfaces/pppoe-wan0/down', { method: 'POST' }); var data = await res.json(); if (data.error) { addPppoeLog('warn', 'Direct disconnect not available'); toast('Disconnect failed', 'error'); } else { toast(t('pppoe_disconnected'), 'success'); addPppoeLog('success', 'PPPoE session disconnected'); setTimeout(loadPppoe, 1000); } } catch (err) { addPppoeLog('error', 'Disconnect error: ' + err.message); toast(t('request_failed', {msg: err.message}), 'error'); } } // ============================================================ // Interfaces // ============================================================ async function loadIfaces() { document.getElementById('if-tb').innerHTML = '
' + t('loading_interfaces') + '
'; const d = await api('/api/interfaces'); if (d.error) { document.getElementById('if-tb').innerHTML = '
⚠️

' + escapeHtml(d.error) + '

'; return; } const typeMap = { local0: t('loopback'), wan0: t('wan'), lan0: t('lan'), lan1: t('lan'), 'pppoe-wan0': t('pppoe_type') }; const descMap = { local0: t('loopback_desc'), wan0: t('wan_desc'), lan0: t('lan_desc'), lan1: t('lan_desc'), 'pppoe-wan0': t('pppoe_desc') }; const badgeMap = { local0: 'b-neutral', wan0: 'b-accent', lan0: 'b-green', lan1: 'b-green', 'pppoe-wan0': 'b-cyan' }; document.getElementById('if-tb').innerHTML = d.interfaces.map(function(i) { const name = i.name, type = typeMap[name] || t('unknown_type'), desc = descMap[name] || ''; const statusClass = i.state === 'up' ? 'b-green' : 'b-yellow'; const stateText = i.state === 'up' ? t('up') : t('down_state'); const toggleBtn = i.state === 'up' ? '' : ''; return '' + name + '' + type + ' ' + stateText + '' + i.mtu + '' + desc + '' + toggleBtn + ''; }).join(''); } async function ifaceUp(name) { toast(t('bringing_up', {name: name}), 'info'); const d = await api('/api/interfaces/' + name + '/up', { method: 'POST' }); if (d.error) toast(t('failed_up', {name: name, msg: d.error}), 'error'); else { toast(t('interface_up', {name: name}), 'success'); loadIfaces(); } } async function ifaceDown(name) { toast(t('bringing_down', {name: name}), 'info'); const d = await api('/api/interfaces/' + name + '/down', { method: 'POST' }); if (d.error) toast(t('failed_down', {name: name, msg: d.error}), 'error'); else { toast(t('interface_down', {name: name}), 'success'); loadIfaces(); } } // ============================================================ // Routes // ============================================================ async function loadRoutes() { document.getElementById('rt-tb').innerHTML = '
' + t('loading_routes') + '
'; document.getElementById('rt-tb').innerHTML = '' + '0.0.0.0/0PPPoEpppoe-wan01' + t('route_default') + '' + '192.168.1.0/24' + t('route_direct') + 'lan00' + t('route_connected') + '' + '10.0.0.0/8---' + t('route_reserved') + ''; } // ============================================================ // DHCP // ============================================================ async function loadDhcp() { showLoading('dhcp-el', t('loading_dhcp')); const d = await api('/api/dhcp/status'); const el = document.getElementById('dhcp-el'); if (d.error) { showError('dhcp-el', d.error, 'loadDhcp()'); return; } if (d.servers && d.servers.length > 0 && d.servers[0] !== '') { el.innerHTML = '' + '
' + t('status') + ' ' + t('enabled') + '
' + '
' + t('interface_name') + 'lan0
' + '
' + t('address_range') + '192.168.1.100 - 192.168.1.200
' + '
' + t('gateway') + '192.168.1.1
' + '
' + '

✓ ' + t('dhcp_active_message') + '

'; } else { el.innerHTML = '
📡

' + t('dhcp_not_enabled') + '

' + '
'; } } async function enableDhcp() { toast(t('enabling_dhcp'), 'info'); const d = await api('/api/dhcp/enable', { method: 'POST' }); if (d.error) toast(t('failed_enable_dhcp', {msg: d.error}), 'error'); else { toast(t('dhcp_enabled_success'), 'success', t('lan_clients_ip')); loadDhcp(); } } // ============================================================ // DNS // ============================================================ async function loadDns() { showLoading('dns-el', t('loading_dns')); const d = await api('/api/dns/status'); const el = document.getElementById('dns-el'); if (d.error) { showError('dns-el', d.error, 'loadDns()'); return; } if (d.status === 'active') { el.innerHTML = '' + '
' + t('status') + ' ' + t('enabled') + '
' + '
' + t('upstream_dns') + '' + (d.upstream || []).join(', ') + '
' + '
' + t('cache_size') + '' + t('cache_entries', {n: d.cache_size || 0}) + '
' + '
' + t('listen_interface') + '' + d.interface + '
' + '
' + '

✓ ' + t('dns_active_message') + '

'; } else { el.innerHTML = '
🔍

' + t('dns_not_enabled') + '

' + '
'; } } async function enableDns() { toast(t('enabling_dns'), 'info'); const d = await api('/api/dns/enable', { method: 'POST' }); if (d.error) toast(t('failed_enable_dns', {msg: d.error}), 'error'); else { toast(t('dns_enabled_success'), 'success', t('lan_clients_resolve')); loadDns(); } } // ============================================================ // NAT // ============================================================ async function loadNat() { showLoading('nat-el', t('loading_nat')); const d = await api('/api/nat/status'); const el = document.getElementById('nat-el'); if (d.error) { showError('nat-el', d.error, 'loadNat()'); return; } if (d.interfaces && d.interfaces.length > 0) { const inside = d.interfaces.find(function(i) { return i.direction === 'in'; }); const outside = d.interfaces.find(function(i) { return i.direction === 'out'; }); el.innerHTML = '' + '
' + t('status') + ' ' + t('enabled') + '
' + '
' + t('inside_interface') + '' + (inside ? inside.name : t('not_configured')) + '
' + '
' + t('outside_interface') + '' + (outside ? outside.name : t('not_configured')) + '
' + '
' + t('sessions_count') + '' + d.sessions.length + '
' + '
' + '

✓ ' + t('nat_active_message') + '

'; } else { el.innerHTML = '
🔄

' + t('nat_not_enabled') + '

' + '
'; } } async function enableNat() { toast(t('enabling_nat'), 'info'); const d = await api('/api/nat/enable', { method: 'POST' }); if (d.error) toast(t('failed_enable_nat', {msg: d.error}), 'error'); else { toast(t('nat_enabled_success'), 'success', t('lan_clients_internet')); loadNat(); } } // ============================================================ // System // ============================================================ async function loadSystem() { showLoading('sys-el', t('loading')); const d = await api('/api/system'); const el = document.getElementById('sys-el'); if (d.error) { showError('sys-el', d.error, 'loadSystem()'); return; } const sys = d.system || {}, cpu = sys.cpu || {}, mem = sys.memory || {}, disk = sys.disk || {}, vpp = d.vpp || {}; el.innerHTML = '' + '
' + t('cpu_usage') + '' + (cpu.percent || 0) + '%
' + '
' + t('cpu_cores') + '' + (cpu.count || '--') + '
' + '
' + t('memory') + '' + (mem.percent || 0) + '% (' + formatBytes(mem.used) + ' / ' + formatBytes(mem.total) + ')
' + '
' + t('disk') + '' + (disk.percent || 0) + '% (' + formatBytes(disk.used) + ' / ' + formatBytes(disk.total) + ')
' + '
' + t('vpp_version') + '' + (vpp.version || 'N/A') + '
' + '
' + t('vpp_interfaces') + '' + (vpp.interface_count || 0) + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + t('cpu_usage') + '' + (cpu.percent || 0) + '%
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + t('memory') + '' + (mem.percent || 0) + '%
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + t('disk') + '' + (disk.percent || 0) + '%
' + '
'; document.getElementById('svc-ver').textContent = d.version || '--'; document.getElementById('svc-vpp-ver').textContent = vpp.version || '--'; document.getElementById('svc-vpp-ifaces').textContent = vpp.interface_count || 0; const pppoeData = await api('/api/pppoe/status'); const hasPppoe = pppoeData.pppoe_clients && pppoeData.pppoe_clients.length > 0; if (hasPppoe) { const c = pppoeData.pppoe_clients[0]; const stateMap = { 0: t('discovering'), 1: t('requesting'), 2: t('session') }; document.getElementById('svc-pppoe-badge').className = 'badge b-green'; document.getElementById('svc-pppoe-badge').innerHTML = '' + t('connected'); document.getElementById('svc-pppoe-state').textContent = stateMap[c.client_state] || t('unknown'); document.getElementById('svc-pppoe-iface').textContent = 'pppoe-wan0'; } else { document.getElementById('svc-pppoe-badge').className = 'badge b-neutral'; document.getElementById('svc-pppoe-badge').innerHTML = '' + t('idle'); document.getElementById('svc-pppoe-state').textContent = t('not_configured'); document.getElementById('svc-pppoe-iface').textContent = '--'; } } // ============================================================ // Initialize // ============================================================ document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { applyLang(); loadDashboard(); startAutoRefresh(); });
